theme: Docker Compose — ko'p konteynerli ilova (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Birinchi compose.yml
tasks.why: Compose — butun stackни bitta YAML'да tavsiflaydi.
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-18/work && mkdir -p web && cd web
docker-compose.yml yarat: services: ичida 'web' (image: nginx:alpine, ports: 8088:80)

tasks.title: Stackни ko'tar (up)
tasks.why: docker compose up -d — barcha servisни fonda ishga tushiradi.
steps: web papkасида:  docker compose -p d18web up -d

tasks.title: volumes bo'limi
steps: snip/vol.yml yarat: services bilan volumes: bo'limi bo'lsin

tasks.title: depends_on
tasks.why: depends_on — servis qaysi boshqasidan keyin ishga tushishini belgilaydi.
steps: snip/dep.yml yarat: web servisida depends_on: - db bo'lsin

tasks.title: Holat va loglar
tasks.why: compose ps/logs — stack holati va chiqishlari.
steps: web papkасида:  docker compose -p d18web ps > ../ps.txt

tasks.title: Ko'p servisli stack
tasks.why: Compose kuchi: bitta up — bir nechta servis.
steps: docker-compose.yml: ikkita servis — web (nginx:alpine) va worker (alpine, command: sleep 600)

tasks.title: Stackни o'chir (down)
tasks.why: docker compose down — butun stackни tozalaydi.
steps: multi papkасида:  docker compose -p d18multi down

tasks.title: Day-16: compose + build
tasks.why: Day-16 Dockerfile + compose: image'ни build: bilan o'zi quradi.

tasks.title: Day-17: servis nomi bilan ulanish
tasks.why: Compose avtomatik tarmoq — servislar nom bilan topishadi.
steps: docker-compose.yml: db va app servislari (ikkalasi alpine, command: sleep 600)
app ичidan db ga:  docker compose -p d18net exec -T app ping -c1 -W2 db > ../cbnet.txt 2>&1
tasks.expect: cbnet.txt — app db ni nom bilan topdi

tasks.title: To'liq stack yoz
tasks.why: web (port) + cache (alpine) — ports bilan to'liq compose.
steps: stack/docker-compose.yml yoz: web (nginx:alpine, ports 8089:80) va cache (alpine, command: sleep 600)

tasks.title: Stackni ishga tushir
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: stackни ko'tarib, ishlashini tasdiqlash.
steps: cd stack && docker compose -p d18proj up -d

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: docker compose nimaga kerakligini + servislar bir-birini qanday topishini ustozга ayt
